title: Wall Street’s Quant Playbook Is Upended as AI Reorders Market
description: The week that AI upended Wall Street’s investing playbook didn’t begin with an earnings miss or a Federal Reserve surprise. It began with a thought experiment on Substack.
content: The week that AI upended Wall Street’s investing playbook didn’t begin with an earnings miss or a Federal Reserve surprise. It began with a thought experiment on Substack.
